bio.ja: 個人開発でWebアプリをいくつか公開しています。
bio.en: I have published several web applications as personal projects.

subtitle.ja: PWA対応の個人リンクサイト

description.ja:
PWA対応のリンク共有アプリ
ネイティブアプリを導入できない学校端末でPWA非対応のアプリを快適に使うために作成
description.en: Developed a PWA-enabled link sharing app to make non-PWA web applications easier and more convenient to use on school-managed devices where native apps cannot be installed.

title.ja: カレンダーサイネージ

subtitle.ja: 生徒会内カレンダー共有システム
subtitle.en: Shared Calendar System for the Student Council

description.ja: Googleカレンダー等のiCal形式で取得できるサイトからWorkersで取得し、複数プロファイルを作成し、共有リンクを作成することで簡単にカレンダーが共有できるアプリ
description.en: An application that uses Cloudflare Workers to retrieve iCalendar (iCal) feeds from services such as Google Calendar, supports multiple calendar profiles, and makes it easy to share calendars through shareable links.

subtitle.ja: 利用枠を常時表示するElectronアプリ
subtitle.en: An Electron app that continuously displays your Claude usage quota.

description.ja:
画面の片隅で「あと5時間枠・週間枠をどれだけ使えるか／今日どれだけ使ったか」をフローティングウィジェットで一目で確認できます。
Claude Code のターミナル風（暖色ダーク＋コーラル）デザイン。
description.en:
A lightweight floating desktop widget for Windows, built with Electron, that continuously displays your Claude Code usage. It provides an at-a-glance view of your remaining 5-hour and weekly usage quotas, as well as your usage for the current day.
The interface is inspired by Claude Code's terminal aesthetic, featuring a warm dark theme accented with coral colors for a clean and familiar experience.

description.ja:
生徒会執行部として活動。
学校行事等の運営を担当。
description.en: Served as a member of the Student Council Executive Committee, helping organize and manage school events and other student activities.
